overview: A high-performance, mobile-first Crypto Portfolio Tracker inspired by Delta and Bloomberg Terminal. Track holdings with real-time CoinGecko prices, visualize performance with interactive charts, and manage assets with an elegant slide-up transaction drawer — all behind Internet Identity login with a Deep Obsidian + Electric Emerald aesthetic.
features: Internet Identity login with persistent portfolios
Dashboard with sticky header, total balance, 24h pulse, and portfolio line chart
Asset list with sparklines, price flash animations, and stagger-in effects
Buy/sell transaction drawer with spring physics
Discover tab: live top 100 coins by market cap
Deep Obsidian + Electric Emerald + Crimson Pulse theme
Glassmorphism headers, skeleton loaders, haptic-style micro-interactions
